narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 4-B (precinct in Huron County) has 511 registered voters, with 70.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
